af_score_components.notes: AIMemo MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Memory/note-taking for AI. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for memo operations. Knowledge management focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Note storage (could contain PII/secrets). Local tool. No encryption. Filesystem permissions apply. No documentation on secret handling.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Local storage reliability. Suitable for agent memory.

af_score_components.notes: AI Novel Prompter MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Creative writing prompt generation. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for generation. Creative tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Generated content (creative). Local tool. No IP protection. Suitable for writing automation.

af_score_components.notes: AIONmcp — AI/IoT framework. Has MCP (quality 70). Documentation adequate. Auth varies by backend. Rate limits for IoT operations. IoT automation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: IoT operations (device control). HTTPS enforced. Auth for IoT platform. Device credentials management. Network security critical. Potential for physical impact.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: IoT reliability (network dependent). Device connectivity variable. Suitable for home automation.

af_score_components.notes: aionui — UI framework(?). No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Purpose unclear. Early stage.
Air Blackbox MCP. Has MCP (quality 65). Flight data/logistics system. Documentation moderate. Auth required. Rate limits documented. Aviation/logistics focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Flight data sensitive (safety, security). Strong auth required. Aviation industry compliance (GDPR, data protection). Audit logging for safety. Professional security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Aviation industry reliability standards. Suitable for flight/logistics automation.

af_score_components.notes: airbroke — unclear purpose. No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Possibly airline/broker related(?). Early stage.
Apache Airflow MCP server. Has MCP (quality 80). Workflow orchestration. Excellent documentation. Auth for Airflow (token/API key). Rate limits documented. Data engineering focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Airflow auth (strong). Pipeline execution (data access). Fine-grained permissions (DAGs, operators). Secret management (Airflow Secrets Backend). Enterprise security.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Airflow is established orchestration tool. Enterprise SLA if hosted. Workflow retry logic. Suitable for data pipeline automation.

af_score_components.notes: Airmang HWPX MCP (Asian document format?). Has MCP (quality 60). Specialized region/format. Documentation limited. Early stage. Niche use case.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Niche regional tool. Limited track record.

af_score_components.notes: airstore — cloud storage system(?). No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Purpose unclear. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: If storage: data protection critical. HTTPS likely. Auth required. Insufficient documentation.

af_score_components.notes: Airtable (no MCP documented). Excellent API documentation. REST API for database/spreadsheet. OAuth2 required. Rate limits well-documented. Business ops focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth2 with granular scopes. SOC2/GDPR compliant. Business data (sensitive records). Row-level security available. Enterprise security posture.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Airtable has enterprise SLA and status page. Cursor pagination. Retry guidance documented. Ideal for business process automation.
